$comment: Manifest read by the /bootstrap-project skill. Placeholders are replaced deterministically (literal find/replace) ONLY in the files listed for each token. After replacement, `grep -rn '{{' <copied files>` must return nothing.

{{GATE_COMMANDS}}.prompt: Commit-gate commands (&&-chained; all must pass before a deliverable commit)

{{PREPUSH_GATE_COMMANDS}}.prompt: Cheap pre-push checks — the fast subset of CI to run on every push (skips doc-only pushes); blank/`:` = gitleaks-only

{{PACKAGE_MANAGER}}.prompt: Package manager / dependency install command prefix (npm | pnpm | yarn | pip | cargo | ...)

specialFiles.CLAUDE.project-block.md: NOT copied verbatim — merged into the target's CLAUDE.md (see bootstrap step 6), then deleted from the copy set.
